name: Proxy Bypass Detection & Enforcement
description: Detects and responds to attempts to bypass the corporate web proxy, including direct HTTP/HTTPS connections that skip the proxy, use of VPN tunnels to external endpoints, SSH SOCKS proxies, and CONNECT method abuse. Riggs AI analyzes the bypass method, user intent, and destinations accessed. Confirmed policy violations trigger traffic blocking, user notification, and compliance documentation. Authorized exceptions for specific applications are documented and whitelisted.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block direct connections that bypass the web proxy and enforce proxy policy

required_integrations.name: Zscaler
required_integrations.reason: Verify proxy enforcement status and manage bypass exceptions

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify security team and user's manager of proxy bypass violations

config.description: Triggers when network monitoring detects web traffic bypassing the corporate proxy via direct connections, tunnels, or evasion techniques

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the proxy bypass: identify the evasion method (direct connection, SSH tunnel, VPN tunnel, CONNECT abuse), destination categories, user identity, department, and data transferred. Determine if this is intentional policy violation, misconfigured application, or potential threat actor activity.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of the proxy bypass method, user context, and destination risk to classify the violation type and intent
Routes based on whether the proxy bypass is intentional evasion or potential threat activity versus a misconfigured application
Blocks the direct connection that bypasses the proxy to enforce corporate web security policy

parameters.comment: Proxy enforcement reinforced after bypass detection — Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Reinforces proxy enforcement on the endpoint to prevent future bypass attempts
Notifies the security team of the proxy bypass violation with user details and enforcement actions

parameters.note:
Proxy bypass by {{trigger_1.alert.username}} — Application: {{analyze_1.application}}. Bypass caused by misconfigured application (not intentional evasion). Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}.

Application exception request created for proxy team review.

config.description: Creates a proxy exception request for applications that legitimately require direct connections and closes the alert
Proxy bypass detection and enforcement workflow complete
